name: deep cave
hints: A deep cave with a bear! Fish bones suggest it feeds here. There's a stone basin and openings.
The bear is dangerous but not immediately hostile. The crevice and dark opening lead deeper.
GET BONE for later use. GO CREV to reach the alien tunnels. The dark opening leads to the ancient cave.
E=volcano interior (8). GO CREV=metal tunnel (9). GO DARK=ancient cave (17). Bear blocks items if angered.
notes: Deep cave with bear. Fish bones (GET BONE) useful later. GO CREV reaches alien tunnels (9). GO DARK reaches ancient cave (17). E=volcano (8). Bear is a threat.
